final_prompt.prompt:
Create a hyper-realistic jewelry close-up photograph of a sapphire ring.

Style/medium: must be hyper-realistic photography
Composition: must be a close-up/macro shot with extreme detail
Subject: must include a sapphire ring with diamond setting (one ring)
Scene/backdrop: must be black velvet background
Lighting/mood: needs a fire/dispersion atmosphere showing light refracting inside the gemstone — exact light source setup is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: must include the fire/dispersion effect inside the sapphire, diamond facets, black velvet texture — exact rendering technique is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve extreme detail level ("纤毫毕现")
Avoid:
